text.title: Swap & Memory Management Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

branch.question: Does the host already have swap sized per r1?

text.example: 8GB cx22 with postgres + n8n + claude → create 16GB swap, swappiness=10, MemoryMax on each.
